Class.Documentation:
A {@link FragmentPagerAdapter} that returns a fragment corresponding to

one of the sections/tabs/pages.

Class.Name: OnboardingPagerAdapter

The fragment argument representing

the section number for this fragment.

Attribute.Name: ARG_SECTION_NUMBER

Operation.Documentation_plain: Returns a new instance of this fragment for the given sectionnumber.
Operation.Name: newInstance

Operation.Documentation: Scroll the screen to avoid edit text being covered by imm such as the soft keyboard.It is better to set the height as 150 because some deviceshas the navigation bar. The height 100 might not trigger the scrolling action.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Scroll the screen to avoid edit text being covered by imm such as the soft keyboard.It is better to set the height as 150 because some deviceshas the navigation bar. The height 100 might not trigger the scrolling action.
Operation.Name: addLayoutListener

Operation.Name: initViews

Operation.Documentation_plain: Handle the scanning result.
Operation.Name: onActivityResult

Operation.Documentation: To handle the permission grant result.If the user denied the permission, show a dialog to explainthe reason why the app need such permission and lead he/herto the system settings to grant permission.
Operation.Documentation_plain: To handle the permission grant result.If the user denied the permission, show a dialog to explainthe reason why the app need such permission and lead he/herto the system settings to grant permission.
Operation.Name: onRequestPermissionsResult

Operation.Documentation: Check whether the camera permission has been granted.If not, request it. Or just launch the camera to scan barcode or QR code.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Check whether the camera permission has been granted.If not, request it. Or just launch the camera to scan barcode or QR code.
Operation.Name: checkPermissionOrToScan

Operation.Documentation_plain: Launch the camera
Operation.Name: startScanningActivity

Operation.Documentation: Set all the packages unreadable which means data is NOT brand new.

Parameter.Name: position

Operation.Documentation: whether connect to internet
Operation.Documentation_plain: whether connect to internet
Operation.Name: networkConnected

Operation.Documentation: Converts sp to px
Operation.Documentation_plain: Converts sp to px
Operation.Name: dip2sp

Operation.Documentation: We intercept the touch handling only to support fast scrolling when initiated from thescroll bar.  Otherwise, we fall back to the default RecyclerView touch handling.
Operation.Documentation_plain: We intercept the touch handling only to support fast scrolling when initiated from thescroll bar. Otherwise, we fall back to the default RecyclerView touch handling.
Operation.Name: onInterceptTouchEvent

Operation.Documentation: Handles the touch event and determines whether to show the fast scroller (or updates it ifit is already showing).
Operation.Documentation_plain: Handles the touch event and determines whether to show the fast scroller (or updates it ifit is already showing).
Operation.Name: handleTouchEvent

Operation.Documentation: Returns the available scroll height:AvailableScrollHeight = Total height of the all items - last page height<p>This assumes that all rows are the same height.
Operation.Documentation_plain:
Returns the available scroll height:AvailableScrollHeight = Total height of the all items - last page height

This assumes that all rows are the same height.
Operation.Name: getAvailableScrollHeight

Parameter.Documentation: the offset from the top of the recycler view to start tracking.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the offset from the top of the recycler view to start tracking.
Parameter.Name: yOffset

Operation.Documentation: Returns the available scroll bar height:AvailableScrollBarHeight = Total height of the visible view - thumb height
Operation.Documentation_plain: Returns the available scroll bar height:AvailableScrollBarHeight = Total height of the visible view - thumb height
Operation.Name: getAvailableScrollBarHeight

Operation.Documentation: Updates the scrollbar thumb offset to match the visible scroll of the recycler view.  It doesthis by mapping the available scroll area of the recycler view to the available space for thescroll bar.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the scrollbar thumb offset to match the visible scroll of the recycler view. It doesthis by mapping the available scroll area of the recycler view to the available space for thescroll bar.
Operation.Name: synchronizeScrollBarThumbOffsetToViewScroll

Parameter.Documentation: the number of rows, used to calculate the total scroll height (assumes that all rows are the same height)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the number of rows, used to calculate the total scroll height (assumes that all rows are the same height)
Parameter.Name: rowCount

Parameter.Documentation: the offset to start tracking in the recycler view (only used for all apps)
Parameter.Documentation_plain: the offset to start tracking in the recycler view (only used for all apps)
Parameter.Name: yOffset

Operation.Documentation: Maps the touch (from 0..1) to the adapter position that should be visible.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Maps the touch (from 0..1) to the adapter position that should be visible.
Operation.Name: scrollToPositionAtProgress

Operation.Documentation: Updates the bounds for the scrollbar.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the bounds for the scrollbar.
Operation.Name: onUpdateScrollbar

Operation.Documentation: Returns the current scroll state of the apps rows.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Returns the current scroll state of the apps rows.
Operation.Name: getCurScrollState

Class.Documentation:
The current scroll state of the recycler view.  We use this in onUpdateScrollbar()

and scrollToPositionAtProgress() to determine the scroll position of the recycler view so

that we can calculate what the scroll bar looks like, and where to jump to from the fast

scroller.
Class.Documentation_plain: The current scroll state of the recycler view. We use this in onUpdateScrollbar() and scrollToPositionAtProgress() to determine the scroll position of the recycler view so that we can calculate what the scroll bar looks like, and where to jump to from the fast scroller.
Class.Name: ScrollPositionState

Attribute.Documentation: The index of the first visible row
Attribute.Documentation_plain: The index of the first visible row
Attribute.Name: rowIndex

Attribute.Documentation: The offset of the first visible row
Attribute.Documentation_plain: The offset of the first visible row
Attribute.Name: rowTopOffset

Attribute.Documentation: The height of a given row (they are currently all the same height)
Attribute.Documentation_plain: The height of a given row (they are currently all the same height)
Attribute.Name: rowHeight

Attribute.Documentation: The inset is the buffer around which a point will still register as a click on the scrollbar
Attribute.Documentation_plain: The inset is the buffer around which a point will still register as a click on the scrollbar
Attribute.Name: mTouchInset

Attribute.Documentation:
This is the offset from the top of the scrollbar when the user first starts touching.  To

prevent jumping, this offset is applied as the user scrolls.
Attribute.Documentation_plain: This is the offset from the top of the scrollbar when the user first starts touching. To prevent jumping, this offset is applied as the user scrolls.
Attribute.Name: mTouchOffset

Operation.Documentation: Handles the touch event and determines whether to show the fast scroller (or updates it ifit is already showing).
Operation.Documentation_plain: Handles the touch event and determines whether to show the fast scroller (or updates it ifit is already showing).
Operation.Name: handleTouchEvent

Operation.Documentation: Returns whether the specified points are near the scroll bar bounds.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Returns whether the specified points are near the scroll bar bounds.
Operation.Name: isNearPoint

Operation.Documentation: Setter/getter for the popup alpha for animations
Operation.Documentation_plain: Setter/getter for the popup alpha for animations
Operation.Name: setOffsetX

Attribute.Documentation: The absolute bounds of the fast scroller bg
Attribute.Documentation_plain: The absolute bounds of the fast scroller bg
Attribute.Name: mBgBounds

Operation.Documentation: Animates the visibility of the fast scroller popup.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Animates the visibility of the fast scroller popup.
Operation.Name: animateVisibility

Operation.Documentation: Setter/getter for the popup alpha for animations
Operation.Documentation_plain: Setter/getter for the popup alpha for animations
Operation.Name: setAlpha

Operation.Documentation: Updates the bounds for the fast scroller.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Updates the bounds for the fast scroller.
Operation.Name: updateFastScrollerBounds
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: the invalidation rect for this update.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: the invalidation rect for this update.

Attribute.Documentation_plain: Get status of a specific number
Attribute.Name: PACKAGE_STATE

Attribute.Documentation: Auto recognize the company of a package number

Attribute.Name: COMPANY_QUERY

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/3/8.

Background service to build notifications and send them to user.
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/3/8. Background service to build notifications and send them to user.
Class.Name: ReminderService

Operation.Documentation: Creates an IntentService.  Invoked by your subclass's constructor.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Creates an IntentService. Invoked by your subclass's constructor.
Operation.Name: ReminderService

Operation.Documentation: Set the details like title, subject, etc. of notifications.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Set the details like title, subject, etc. of notifications.
Operation.Name: setNotifications

Operation.Documentation: Update the package by accessing network,then build and send the notifications.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Update the package by accessing network,then build and send the notifications.
Operation.Name: refreshPackage

Operation.Documentation: Called when fast scrolling begins
Operation.Documentation_plain: Called when fast scrolling begins
Operation.Name: onFastScrollStart

Operation.Documentation: Called when fast scrolling ends

Operation.Name: onFastScrollStop

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/11.

An interface for {@link android.support.v7.widget.RecyclerView} item.
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/11. An interface for {@link android.support.v7.widget.RecyclerView} item.
Class.Name: OnRecyclerViewItemClickListener

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/9.

Immutable model class for a CompanyRecognition.
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/9. Immutable model class for a CompanyRecognition.
Class.Name: CompanyRecognition

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/10.

Immutable model class for a Package.

示例JSON格式

JSON format sample

{

"message":"ok",

"nu":"47258833029",

"ischeck":"1",

"condition":"F00",

"com":"jd",

"status":"200",

"state":"3",

"data":

[

{

"time":"2016-12-13 21:35:51",

"ftime":"2016-12-13 21:35:51",

"context":"货物已完成配送，感谢您选择京东配送",

"location":""

},

{

"time":"2016-12-13 11:01:55",

"ftime":"2016-12-13 11:01:55",

"context":"配送员开始配送，请您准备收货，配送员，朱小宝，手机号，13060495388或0917-2622505",

"location":""

},

{

"time":"2016-12-13 10:06:25",

"ftime":"2016-12-13 10:06:25",

"context":"货物已分配，等待配送",

"location":""

},

{

"time":"2016-12-13 10:06:22",

"ftime":"2016-12-13 10:06:22",

"context":"货物已到达【宝鸡北环站】","location":""

},

...

]

}
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/10. Immutable model class for a Package. 示例JSON格式 JSON format sample { "message":"ok", "nu":"47258833029", "ischeck":"1", "condition":"F00", "com":"jd", "status":"200", "state":"3", "data": [ { "time":"2016-12-13 21:35:51", "ftime":"2016-12-13 21:35:51", "context":"货物已完成配送，感谢您选择京东配送", "location":"" }, { "time":"2016-12-13 11:01:55", "ftime":"2016-12-13 11:01:55", "context":"配送员开始配送，请您准备收货，配送员，朱小宝，手机号，13060495388或0917-2622505", "location":"" }, { "time":"2016-12-13 10:06:25", "ftime":"2016-12-13 10:06:25", "context":"货物已分配，等待配送", "location":"" }, { "time":"2016-12-13 10:06:22", "ftime":"2016-12-13 10:06:22", "context":"货物已到达【宝鸡北环站】","location":"" }, ... ] }
Class.Name: Package

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/23.

Immutable model class for a Company.

JSON format sample

{

‘name’:'EMS',

'id':'ems',

'tel':'11183',

'website':'http://www.ems.com.cn/',

'alphabet':'ems',

'avatar': '#009688'

}
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/23. Immutable model class for a Company. JSON format sample { ‘name’:'EMS', 'id':'ems', 'tel':'11183', 'website':'http://www.ems.com.cn/', 'alphabet':'ems', 'avatar': '#009688' }
Class.Name: Company

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/24.

Immutable model class for a PackageStatus.
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/24. Immutable model class for a PackageStatus.
Class.Name: PackageStatus

Class.Documentation:
Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/12.

Concrete implementation to load packages from the data sources into a cache.

<p/>

For simplicity, this implements a dumb synchronisation between locally persisted data and data

obtained from the server, by using the remote data source only if the local database

is not the latest.
Class.Documentation_plain: Created by lizhaotailang on 2017/2/12. Concrete implementation to load packages from the data sources into a cache. <p/> For simplicity, this implements a dumb synchronisation between locally persisted data and data obtained from the server, by using the remote data source only if the local database is not the latest.
Class.Name: PackagesRepository

Operation.Documentation: Prevent direct instantiation
Operation.Documentation_plain: Prevent direct instantiation
Operation.Name: PackagesRepository

Operation.Documentation: The access for other classes.
Operation.Documentation_plain: The access for other classes.
Operation.Name: getInstance

Operation.Documentation: It is designed to gotten the packages from both databaseand network. Which are faster then return them.But in our app, we need not to update the data by accessing the networkwhen user enter the app every time because we run a service in backyard.So we just return the data from database.But in future, it may change.
Operation.Documentation_plain: It is designed to gotten the packages from both databaseand network. Which are faster then return them.But in our app, we need not to update the data by accessing the networkwhen user enter the app every time because we run a service in backyard.So we just return the data from database.But in future, it may change.
Operation.Name: getPackages

Operation.Documentation: Get a package of specific number from data source.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Get a package of specific number from data source.
Operation.Name: getPackage

Parameter.Documentation: The primary key or the package id. See {@link Package}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary key or the package id. See {@link Package}.
Parameter.Name: packNumber

Operation.Documentation: Save the package to data source and cache.It is supposed to save it to database and network too.But we have no cloud(The account system) yet.It may change either.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Save the package to data source and cache.It is supposed to save it to database and network too.But we have no cloud(The account system) yet.It may change either.
Operation.Name: savePackage

Parameter.Documentation: The package to save. See more @{@link Package}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The package to save. See more @{@link Package}.
Parameter.Name: pack

Operation.Documentation: Delete a package from data source and cache.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Delete a package from data source and cache.
Operation.Name: deletePackage

Parameter.Documentation: The primary id or in another words, the package number. See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary id or in another words, the package number. See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Name: packageId

Operation.Documentation: Refresh the packages.Just call the remote data source and it will make everything done.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Refresh the packages.Just call the remote data source and it will make everything done.
Operation.Name: refreshPackages

Operation.Documentation: Refresh one package.Just call the remote data source and it will make everything done.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Refresh one package.Just call the remote data source and it will make everything done.
Operation.Name: refreshPackage

Parameter.Documentation: The primary key(The package number). See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary key(The package number). See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Name: packageId

Operation.Documentation: Set the packages read in both data source and cache.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Set the packages read in both data source and cache.
Operation.Name: setAllPackagesRead

Operation.Documentation: Set a package with specific number read or unread newin both data source and cache.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Set a package with specific number read or unread newin both data source and cache.
Operation.Name: setPackageReadable

Parameter.Documentation: The primary key (The package number). See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary key (The package number). See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Name: packageId

Operation.Documentation: Checkout out the existence of a package with specific number.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Checkout out the existence of a package with specific number.
Operation.Name: isPackageExist

Parameter.Documentation: The primary key or in another words, the package number. See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary key or in another words, the package number. See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Name: packageId

Operation.Documentation: Get a package with package number.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Get a package with package number.
Operation.Name: getPackageWithNumber

Parameter.Documentation: The package id(number). See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The package id(number). See more @{@link Package#number}.
Parameter.Name: packNumber

Operation.Documentation: As the function name says, get a package from local repository.
Operation.Documentation_plain: As the function name says, get a package from local repository.
Operation.Name: getPackageWithNumberFromLocalRepository

Operation.Documentation: Get the packages in database and sort them in timestamp descending.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Get the packages in database and sort them in timestamp descending.
Operation.Name: getPackages

Operation.Documentation_plain: Get a package in database of specific number.
Operation.Name: getPackage

Parameter.Documentation: The primary key or in another words, the package id.See {@link Package#number}
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary key or in another words, the package id.See {@link Package#number}
Parameter.Name: packNumber

Operation.Name: savePackage

Parameter.Documentation: The package to save. See {@link Package}
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The package to save. See {@link Package}
Parameter.Name: pack

Operation.Documentation: Delete a package with specific id from database.

Operation.Name: deletePackage

Parameter.Documentation_plain: The primary key of a package or in another words, the package id.See {@link Package#number}
Parameter.Name: packageId

Parameter.Name: packageId

Parameter.Name: readable

Operation.Documentation_plain: Query the existence of a specific number.
Operation.Name: isPackageExist

Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: whether the number is in the database.

Parameter.Documentation: the package number to query. See {@link Package#number}

Operation.Name: getInstance

Operation.Documentation: Update and save the packages' status by accessing the Internet.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Update and save the packages' status by accessing the Internet.
Operation.Name: refreshPackages
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: The observable packages whose status are the latest.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: The observable packages whose status are the latest.

Operation.Documentation: Update and save a package's status by accessing the network.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Update and save a package's status by accessing the network.
Operation.Name: refreshPackage
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: The observable package of latest status.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: The observable package of latest status.

Parameter.Documentation: The package's id or number. See {@link Package#number}
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The package's id or number. See {@link Package#number}
Parameter.Name: packageId

Operation.Documentation: A valid barcode has been found, so give an indication of success and showthe results.
Operation.Documentation_plain: A valid barcode has been found, so give an indication of success and showthe results.
Operation.Name: handleDecode

Operation.Documentation: Init the camera.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Init the camera.
Operation.Name: initCamera

Operation.Documentation: Init the interception rectangle area
Operation.Documentation_plain: Init the interception rectangle area
Operation.Name: initCrop

Operation.Documentation: 从相机支持的分辨率中计算出最适合的预览界面尺寸
Operation.Documentation_plain: 从相机支持的分辨率中计算出最适合的预览界面尺寸
Operation.Name: findBestPreviewSizeValue

Class.Documentation:
This object wraps the Camera service object and expects to be the only one

talking to it. The implementation encapsulates the steps needed to take

preview-sized images, which are used for both preview and decoding.

@author dswitkin@google.com (Daniel Switkin)
Class.Documentation_plain:
This object wraps the Camera service object and expects to be the only one talking to it. The implementation encapsulates the steps needed to take preview-sized images, which are used for both preview and decoding.
@author dswitkin@google.com (Daniel Switkin)
Class.Name: CameraManager

Attribute.Documentation:
Preview frames are delivered here, which we pass on to the registered

handler. Make sure to clear the handler so it will only receive one

message.
Attribute.Documentation_plain: Preview frames are delivered here, which we pass on to the registered handler. Make sure to clear the handler so it will only receive one message.
Attribute.Name: previewCallback

Operation.Documentation: Opens the camera driver and initializes the hardware parameters.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Opens the camera driver and initializes the hardware parameters.
Operation.Name: openDriver
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: @throws IOException Indicates the camera driver failed to open.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: @throws IOException Indicates the camera driver failed to open.

Parameter.Documentation: The surface object which the camera will draw preview framesinto.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The surface object which the camera will draw preview framesinto.
Parameter.Name: holder

Operation.Documentation: Closes the camera driver if still in use.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Closes the camera driver if still in use.
Operation.Name: closeDriver

Operation.Documentation: Asks the camera hardware to begin drawing preview frames to the screen.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Asks the camera hardware to begin drawing preview frames to the screen.
Operation.Name: startPreview

Operation.Documentation: Tells the camera to stop drawing preview frames.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Tells the camera to stop drawing preview frames.
Operation.Name: stopPreview

Operation.Documentation: A single preview frame will be returned to the handler supplied. The datawill arrive as byte[] in the message.obj field, with width and heightencoded as message.arg1 and message.arg2, respectively.
Operation.Documentation_plain: A single preview frame will be returned to the handler supplied. The datawill arrive as byte[] in the message.obj field, with width and heightencoded as message.arg1 and message.arg2, respectively.
Operation.Name: requestPreviewFrame

Parameter.Documentation: The handler to send the message to.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The handler to send the message to.
Parameter.Name: handler

Parameter.Documentation: The what field of the message to be sent.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The what field of the message to be sent.
Parameter.Name: message

Operation.Documentation: Allows third party apps to specify the camera ID, rather than determineit automatically based on available cameras and their orientation.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Allows third party apps to specify the camera ID, rather than determineit automatically based on available cameras and their orientation.
Operation.Name: setManualCameraId

Parameter.Documentation: camera ID of the camera to use. A negative value means"no preference".
Parameter.Documentation_plain: camera ID of the camera to use. A negative value means"no preference".
Parameter.Name: cameraId

Operation.Documentation: 获取相机分辨率
Operation.Documentation_plain: 获取相机分辨率
Operation.Name: getCameraResolution

Operation.Documentation: Opens the requested camera with {@link Camera#open(int)}, if one exists.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Opens the requested camera with {@link Camera#open(int)}, if one exists.
Operation.Name: open
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: handle to {@link Camera} that was opened
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: handle to {@link Camera} that was opened

Parameter.Documentation: camera ID of the camera to use. A negative value means"no preference"
Parameter.Documentation_plain: camera ID of the camera to use. A negative value means"no preference"
Parameter.Name: cameraId

Operation.Documentation: Opens a rear-facing camera with {@link Camera#open(int)}, if one exists,or opens camera 0.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Opens a rear-facing camera with {@link Camera#open(int)}, if one exists,or opens camera 0.
Operation.Name: open
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: handle to {@link Camera} that was opened
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: handle to {@link Camera} that was opened

Class.Documentation:
Finishes an activity after a period of inactivity if the device is on battery

power.
Class.Documentation_plain: Finishes an activity after a period of inactivity if the device is on battery power.
Class.Name: InactivityTimer

Class.Documentation:
This class handles all the messaging which comprises the state machine for

capture.

@author dswitkin@google.com (Daniel Switkin)
Class.Name: CaptureActivityHandler

Class.Documentation: Manages beeps and vibrations for {@link CaptureActivity}.
Class.Documentation_plain: Manages beeps and vibrations for {@link CaptureActivity}.
Class.Name: BeepManager

Class.Documentation:
This thread does all the heavy lifting of decoding the images.

@author dswitkin@google.com (Daniel Switkin)
Class.Documentation_plain:
This thread does all the heavy lifting of decoding the images.
@author dswitkin@google.com (Daniel Switkin)
Class.Name: DecodeThread

Operation.Documentation: Decode the data within the viewfinder rectangle, and time how long ittook. For efficiency, reuse the same reader objects from one decode tothe next.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Decode the data within the viewfinder rectangle, and time how long ittook. For efficiency, reuse the same reader objects from one decode tothe next.
Operation.Name: decode

Parameter.Documentation: The width of the preview frame.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The width of the preview frame.
Parameter.Name: width

Parameter.Documentation: The height of the preview frame.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: The height of the preview frame.
Parameter.Name: height

Operation.Documentation: A factory method to build the appropriate LuminanceSource object based onthe format of the preview buffers, as described by Camera.Parameters.
Operation.Documentation_plain: A factory method to build the appropriate LuminanceSource object based onthe format of the preview buffers, as described by Camera.Parameters.
Operation.Name: buildLuminanceSource

AssociationEnd.Documentation:
Preview frames are delivered here, which we pass on to the registered

handler. Make sure to clear the handler so it will only receive one

message.
AssociationEnd.Documentation_plain: Preview frames are delivered here, which we pass on to the registered handler. Make sure to clear the handler so it will only receive one message.
AssociationEnd.Name: previewCallback
